description_long: This bungalow is a two-story residential building surrounded by a white picket fence, featuring a spacious yard with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and a shaded patio area. The main structure has a flat roof and a modern, rectangular design with large windows and sliding glass doors. The front facade includes a covered porch with steps leading up to the entrance, and the exterior walls are finished in a combination of light beige and white tones. The backyard is landscaped with a tree and green lawn, while the pool area is equipped with an umbrella and outdoor furniture. The side patio is covered with a pergola, providing a shaded space for relaxation or dining. The overall layout is open and inviting, with clear zones for recreation, relaxation, and entry.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, white picket fence, swimming pool, shaded patio, and a covered front porch, featuring large windows and a landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, pool area with sun loungers, and the white picket fence.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back facade, large windows, and the green lawn with a tree in the corner.
description_view_2: Opposite front view displaying the porch steps, side patio with pergola, and the pool with umbrella.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the length of the building, pool area, and the arrangement of windows along the facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
